description.en: A scheme by the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas to provide clean cooking fuel (LPG connections) to women from poor households, improving their health and environment.

benefits.en: Provides free LPG connection, financial assistance of ₹1,600 per connection, and interest-free loan for stove and first refill.

en: Step 1: Visit pmuy.gov.in or nearest LPG distributor.
Step 2: Submit the KYC application form along with Aadhaar and Ration Card.
Step 3: Once verified, LPG connection is issued under the woman's name.
Step 1: Visit pmuy.gov.in or nearest LPG distributor.
Step 2: Submit the KYC application form along with Aadhaar and Ration Card.
Step 3: Once verified, LPG connection is issued under the woman's name.

description.en: National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, basic savings accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, and pension in an affordable manner.

benefits.en: Interest on savings deposit, Rupay Debit card with ₹2 Lakh accident insurance cover, zero balance account, and overdraft facility up to ₹10,000 to eligible account holders.

en: Step 1: Visit the nearest commercial bank branch or Bank Mitra outlet.
Step 2: Fill out the PMJDY account opening form.
Step 3: Submit the form along with Aadhaar copy and photo.
Step 1: Visit the nearest commercial bank branch or Bank Mitra outlet.
Step 2: Fill out the PMJDY account opening form.
Step 3: Submit the form along with Aadhaar copy and photo.

description.en: Provides partial wage compensation and nutrition incentives to pregnant women and lactating mothers for safe motherhood and child healthcare.

benefits.en: Cash incentive of ₹5,000 in two instalments for the first child, and ₹6,000 for the second child (if it's a girl child).

en: Step 1: Register at your local Anganwadi Centre (AWC) or health facility.
Step 2: Submit Form 1-A with documents within 150 days of LMP.
Step 3: Submit Form 1-B and child birth proof for subsequent benefits.
Step 1: Register at your local Anganwadi Centre (AWC) or health facility.
Step 2: Submit Form 1-A with documents within 150 days of LMP.
Step 3: Submit Form 1-B and child birth proof for subsequent benefits.

description.en: Provides food, shelter, clothing, legal aid, clinical aid, and training to women in difficult circumstances who are in need of institutional support for rehabilitation.

benefits.en: Free temporary residential accommodation, food, medical care, legal aid, counselling, and vocational training.

documentsRequired: Police FIR/Reference from social welfare (if applicable)

en: Step 1: Walk in to a registered Swadhar Greh or shelter home.
Step 2: Implementing agency verifies distress and arranges admission.
Step 3: Health checkup and counselling are conducted within three days.
Step 1: Walk in to a registered Swadhar Greh or shelter home.
Step 2: Implementing agency verifies distress and arranges admission.
Step 3: Health checkup and counselling are conducted within three days.

description.en: Sanctioned by the Govt. of Karnataka to assist women in gaining self-reliance through self-employment, mainly in trade and service sectors, by providing loan subsidies through banks.

benefits.en: For SC/ST candidates, up to 50% subsidy on loan unit costs between ₹1,00,000 to ₹3,00,000. For general/special, 30% subsidy (up to ₹90,000). Includes EDP training.

en: Step 1: Visit nearest bank or KSFC branch with DPR.
Step 2: Complete the Udyogini business loan application.
Step 3: Bank processes loan and requests corporation for subsidy.
Step 1: Visit nearest bank or KSFC branch with DPR.
Step 2: Complete the Udyogini business loan application.
Step 3: Bank processes loan and requests corporation for subsidy.

description.en: Implemented by Ministry of Social Justice. Aims to provide women entrepreneurs from backward classes (OBCs) term loans for self-employment.

benefits.en: Provides term loan of up to ₹2,00,000/- at a highly subsidized interest rate of 5% per annum. No self-contribution is required.

en: Step 1: Visit nearest State Channelising Agency (SCA) office.
Step 2: Fill out Swarnima Scheme application form.
Step 3: Submit application with OBC certificate and income proof.
Step 1: Visit nearest State Channelising Agency (SCA) office.
Step 2: Fill out Swarnima Scheme application form.
Step 3: Submit application with OBC certificate and income proof.

description.en: An aggregator platform initiated by NITI Aayog that hosts information and services relevant to women entrepreneurs, enabling mentorship and funding access.

benefits.en: Access to workshops, mentoring, startup support courses, community forums, and partner funding resources.

en: Step 1: Register online at https://wep.gov.in/.
Step 2: Create profile describing your entrepreneurship domain.
Step 3: Browse and apply for partner mentoring/funding programs.
Step 1: Register online at https://wep.gov.in/.
Step 2: Create profile describing your entrepreneurship domain.
Step 3: Browse and apply for partner mentoring/funding programs.

description.en: A scheme by the Ministry of Finance to facilitate bank loans between ₹10 Lakh and ₹1 Crore to SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs for greenfield projects.

benefits.en: Composite bank loans from ₹10 Lakhs up to ₹1 Crore. Sidbi portal hand-holding support and refinancing options.

en: Step 1: Visit standupmitra.in or any bank branch.
Step 2: Complete the registration describing the greenfield business.
Step 3: Provide required financial/DPR reports and submit application.
Step 1: Visit standupmitra.in or any bank branch.
Step 2: Complete the registration describing the greenfield business.
Step 3: Provide required financial/DPR reports and submit application.

description.en: A self-employment scheme in the coir industry providing training in coir spinning and motorized ratts to rural women artisans in coir-producing coastal regions.

benefits.en: Free training, ₹3,00,0 stipend per month during training, subsidized coir ratts and equipment, and PMEGP loan linkage.

en: Step 1: Check notifications from local Coir Board training centers.
Step 2: Apply for the coir spinning training programme.
Step 3: Complete training and submit application for rattle subsidy.
Step 1: Check notifications from local Coir Board training centers.
Step 2: Apply for the coir spinning training programme.
Step 3: Complete training and submit application for rattle subsidy.

description.en: Provides collateral-free loans up to ₹10 Lakhs for micro and small enterprises in manufacturing, trading, and services.

benefits.en: Collateral-free loans in three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (up to ₹5 Lakhs), and Tarun (up to ₹10 Lakhs).

en: Step 1: Apply online through the Udyami Mitra portal (udyamimitra.in) or visit any commercial bank.
Step 2: Choose loan category (Shishu, Kishor, Tarun).
Step 3: Submit application with KYC documents and project report.
Step 1: Apply online through the Udyami Mitra portal (udyamimitra.in) or visit any commercial bank.
Step 2: Choose loan category (Shishu, Kishor, Tarun).
Step 3: Submit application with KYC documents and project report.
